Package com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.model

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.model.User
public class User extends Object
User.java Model class representing a user document from the Firestore users collection.g Aligned with the database design in /docs/db/initial_db.txt.
